subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Testament! Thy mellifluous poems were most sweet, possessing eloquent phrasing and fluent expressions. Talent is like a spring
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان اشعار آبدار در نهایت حلاوت بود لفظ فصیح و مضمون بلیغ داشت
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha
